query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_attempts, 
       SUM(isCorrect) as total_correct,
       MAX(completedAt) as latest_attempt
FROM puzzle_attempts;

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_players,
       SUM(CASE WHEN totalPuzzles > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as players_with_puzzles
FROM players;
